# Support

## Getting help

| Need | Where |
|------|--------|
| **Bug** | [Bug report issue](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) |
| **Feature idea** | [Feature request](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) or [Discussions](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/discussions) |
| **Docs gap** | [Documentation issue](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/issues/new?template=documentation.yml) |
| **Security** | [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — **no public issues** |
| **Governed swarms** | [Quick reference](../docs/governed-roadmap-projection-quickref.md) · [Runbook](../docs/governed-execution-runbook.md) · [Governed issue template](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/issues/new?template=governed_execution.yml) |

## Before you open an issue

1. Use the latest [release](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/releases) or `main` — see [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md).
2. Search [issues](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/issues) and [discussions](https://github.com/CardSorting/LUMI/discussions).
3. For extension problems, include **LUMI version**, **VS Code version**, and **provider/model**.
4. For swarm incidents, attach or summarize `subagent_executions/*.governed.*` receipt fields (redact secrets).

## Enterprise

On-prem and self-hosted guidance: [docs/ENTERPRISE_DEPLOYMENT.md](../docs/ENTERPRISE_DEPLOYMENT.md).
